channel.title: Comments on: Founders Brewing Company: Cerise, Ep. 103
channel.description: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

item.title: By: Paul
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
Glad you liked it Scott! I'm not a fruit beer fan either, but this one was certainly unique and an excellent summer beer.
Paul
item.content:encoded:
Glad you liked it Scott! I’m not a fruit beer fan either, but this one was certainly unique and an excellent summer beer.

Paul

item.title: By: Scott Coughlin
item.dc:creator: Scott Coughlin
item.description:
Thank you guys for turning me onto Cerise. I would have never have tried this, not a fruit beer fan, but the three of you seemed to enjoy it so I picked up a 4 pack. I am so glad I did. A wonderfully refreshing summertime beer.
Enjoy each episode, keep them coming.
item.content:encoded:
Thank you guys for turning me onto Cerise. I would have never have tried this, not a fruit beer fan, but the three of you seemed to enjoy it so I picked up a 4 pack. I am so glad I did. A wonderfully refreshing summertime beer.

Enjoy each episode, keep them coming.
